notable_achievements: The International 2021 Champion with Team Spirit; multiple DPC league victories
bio: Collapse is widely regarded as one of the best offlane players in the world, known for his Magnus play, particularly the Reverse Polarity initiations that have become a hallmark of his career. His TI 2021 championship run with Team Spirit is considered legendary, as the team came from the lower bracket to win the entire event.

notable_achievements: The International 2021 Champion with Team Spirit; TI 2021 MVP/Best Carry recognition
bio: Yatoro is considered one of the best carry players in the world, known for his aggressive laning, exceptional last-hitting, and ability to carry games single-handedly. His TI 2021 performance cemented his legacy as one of the most gifted position 1 players of his generation.

notable_achievements: The International 2023 Champion with Team Spirit
bio: Larl joined Team Spirit and quickly rose to become one of the most impactful midlaners in the world. His aggressive rotations, mechanical skill on Spirit heroes, and ability to dominate lane matchups contributed directly to Team Spirit's TI 2023 championship.

notable_achievements: Rising CIS support talent with Team Spirit
bio: rue is a young soft support player for Team Spirit known for his unconventional hero picks and creative playstyle. His Techies play in particular has drawn attention for the disruptive impact he creates in teamfights and across the map.

notable_achievements: The International 2021 Champion with Team Spirit; leader and captain of Team Spirit
bio: Miposhka is the captain of Team Spirit and one of the most respected hard supports in the CIS scene. He is known for his leadership, calm decision-making under pressure, and ability to enable his teammates through selfless positioning and precise ward placement. He was a key architect of Team Spirit's TI 2021 championship.

notable_achievements: One of the highest-rated mid players in the CIS region; multiple DPC top placements with BetBoom Team
bio: Gpk is regarded as one of the most mechanically gifted midlaners in Dota 2. Known for his explosive laning phase and ability to take over games on mobility-focused heroes, he has consistently been a standout performer for BetBoom Team in international competition.

notable_achievements: The International 2022 Champion with Tundra Esports
bio: Pure is a prodigiously talented carry player who became a world champion at just 18 years old as part of Tundra Esports' historic TI 2022 run. Despite being disqualified from competing at the event itself due to visa/flag issues, he was part of the championship roster. Known for his quiet demeanor and exceptional mechanical skill, he is considered one of the cleanest carry players in the world.

notable_achievements: Key offlaner for BetBoom Team in tier-1 CIS competition
bio: Miero is the offlaner for BetBoom Team, known for his durable, team-oriented playstyle. He specializes in aura heroes and initiators that enable his cores to scale safely, contributing to BetBoom's consistent presence at international tier-1 events.

notable_achievements: One of the most creative soft supports in the CIS region; key player for BetBoom Team
bio: Save is a highly creative position 4 support for BetBoom Team, known for his Rubick play and unorthodox item builds that maximize his impact in teamfights. His ability to steal and use enemy spells at the perfect moment has made him one of the most feared supports at the tier-1 level.

notable_achievements: Veteran hard support for BetBoom Team; DPC circuit competitor
bio: Kataomi is the hard support for BetBoom Team, providing experienced leadership and reliable positioning across his hero pool. As one of the older players on the roster, he brings composure and drafting wisdom that anchors the team's structure.

notable_achievements: The International 2022 Champion with Tundra Esports; multiple Major placements
bio: Nightfall is a versatile carry player who won The International 2022 with Tundra Esports. After his time with Tundra, he moved through several organizations before joining Aurora Gaming. Known for his mechanical skill and adaptability to different carry roles within a team system.

notable_achievements: One of the most promising young mid players from the CIS region
bio: Kiyotaka is a young and highly mechanical midlaner who has risen quickly through the CIS scene. After passing through numerous organizations, he found his home at Aurora Gaming where his aggressive, tempo-driven midlane play has been integral to the team's strategy.

notable_achievements: The International 2021 Champion with Team Spirit
bio: TORONTOTOKYO is a multi-role player best known for his championship run with Team Spirit at TI 2021, where he primarily played as a versatile offlaner/support hybrid. His unique hero pool spanning multiple roles makes him one of the most adaptable players in the scene. After stints with Team Spirit and BetBoom Team, he was with Aurora Gaming before an uncertain roster status.

notable_achievements: TI 2021 Champion with Team Spirit; versatile support known for creative plays
bio: Mira is a soft support who won The International 2021 with Team Spirit. Known for his Rubick spell theft and creative Mirana arrow combinations, he brings flair and unpredictability to Aurora Gaming's support lineup.

notable_achievements: Experienced CIS hard support; key player in Aurora Gaming's lineup
bio: Panto is a veteran hard support known for his Oracle and Shadow Demon play. His ability to save teammates and control teamfights through precise spell usage makes him a reliable backbone for Aurora Gaming. Note: The table lists Team Spirit as current team, but bio content indicates he joined Aurora Gaming in February 2025.

notable_achievements: One of the youngest professional Dota 2 players at the tier-1 level; rising carry star
bio: Satanic is an extraordinarily young carry player who turned professional before turning 16. Despite his age, he shows exceptional mechanical skill and game sense that belies his years. His development through the Yellow Submarine and Team Spirit academies before reaching PARIVISION marks him as one of the most exciting prospects in the CIS scene.

notable_achievements: The International 2017 finalist with Virtus.pro; one of the most accomplished CIS mid players of his generation
bio: Noone is a veteran midlaner with over a decade of tier-1 experience. Best known for his legendary Invoker play and his TI 2017 run with Virtus.pro, he has reinvented himself at PARIVISION. His wealth of experience and deep hero pool make him a calming influence on the roster.

notable_achievements: Experienced offlaner with deep tier-1 experience across CIS and EU scenes
bio: DM is one of the most widely-traveled players in competitive Dota 2, having represented a long list of organizations across his career. His Brewmaster play is particularly celebrated, and he brings chaos-disruption expertise to PARIVISION's offlane that makes him an unpredictable matchup for opposing teams.

notable_achievements: Rising CIS soft support talent; key player for PARIVISION
bio: 9class is a versatile position 4 support for PARIVISION known for his unconventional hero picks and ability to generate pressure across the map. His Pudge play in the support role has become a calling card, showcasing his creative approach to the game.

notable_achievements: Experienced hard support who has worked his way up through the CIS scene to tier-1 competition
bio: Dukalis is a hard support for PARIVISION who has earned his place at the top level through years of consistent play across numerous organizations. Specializing in pushing-oriented supports and nature-based heroes, he provides reliable lane support and objective control for his team.

notable_achievements: Multiple TI appearances with Team Secret; considered one of the top Western midlaners of his era
bio: Nisha is a Polish midlaner who spent several years as the centerpiece of Team Secret before joining Team Liquid. Known for his Templar Assassin and Storm Spirit dominance, he is regarded as one of the most consistent Western mid players, combining deep hero knowledge with excellent execution in high-pressure series.

notable_achievements: One of Europe's most consistent carry players; multiple DPC top placements with Team Liquid
bio: miCKe is a Swedish carry player for Team Liquid who has established himself as one of the most reliable position 1 players in the Western scene. His Morphling play is particularly noteworthy, and he has been a constant presence in Team Liquid's roster as they compete for international titles.

notable_achievements: Multiple DPC top placements with Team Liquid; experienced NA/EU offlaner
bio: SabeRLight- is a Czech offlaner who has competed across both the North American and European scenes before settling with Team Liquid. His strength lies in durable, aura-based offlaners that enable his team to push and control objectives, and he has been a stabilizing presence in Team Liquid's frontline.

notable_achievements: Multiple TI appearances with Team Liquid and Alliance; one of Europe's most decorated soft supports
bio: Boxi is a Swedish soft support who has been a mainstay in European Dota 2 for years, first with Alliance and then with Team Liquid. His Earth Spirit and Rubick play are world-class, and his aggressive roaming style creates constant pressure across the map. He is widely considered one of the best position 4 supports in Western Dota.

notable_achievements: Multiple TI appearances as captain of Team Liquid; one of the most celebrated captains/hard supports in Western Dota
bio: iNSaNiA is the captain and hard support of Team Liquid, widely regarded as one of the best captains in Western Dota 2. His Oracle play is legendary — the precision of his Fortune's End and False Promise saves has produced countless iconic moments. Beyond mechanics, his draft preparation and in-game leadership are cornerstones of Team Liquid's identity.

notable_achievements: DPC circuit competitor with Gaimin Gladiators and Team Liquid
bio: Tofu is a German hard support player who built his career through the European circuit before joining Team Liquid. Known for his reliable positioning and utility-focused hero pool, he provides steady support play that complements Team Liquid's structured approach to the game.

notable_achievements: Multiple TI appearances with Team Secret, Ninjas in Pyjamas, and Team Liquid; one of Europe's most experienced offlaners
bio: Ace is a veteran Danish offlaner who has competed at the highest level of Dota 2 for well over a decade. Known for his Underlord and Broodmother specialist picks, he brings deep experience and adaptability to Team Liquid. His ability to execute niche strategies and hold difficult lanes makes him invaluable in complex drafts.

notable_achievements: Top CIS carry; multiple international LAN placements with Gaimin Gladiators and Team Yandex
bio: Watson is a Kazakhstani carry player who has established himself as one of the premier position 1 players in the CIS region. After strong performances with Gaimin Gladiators and other organizations, he joined Team Yandex where his explosive farming and team fight impact have made him a central pillar of the team's offense.

notable_achievements: The International 2022 Champion with Tundra Esports; 3x Major Champion
bio: Skiter is a Slovak carry player and TI 2022 world champion. Known for his methodical, scaling carry playstyle and exceptional late-game decision-making, he was a cornerstone of Tundra Esports' championship run. After Tundra, he joined Team Falcons and has continued to perform at the highest level as one of Europe's most accomplished position 1 players.

notable_achievements: The International 2022 Runner-Up with OG; one of the youngest TI finalists in history
bio: ATF is one of the most charismatic and mechanically gifted offlaners in Dota 2. Infamous for his Mars play and his viral 'standing in base' meme moment, he reached the TI 2022 Grand Final with OG at just 17 years old. After OG, he moved through several organizations before joining Team Falcons, where his explosive playstyle continues to terrorize opponents.

notable_achievements: Rising CIS mid talent; multiple DPC placements with Nemiga Gaming and Team Falcons
bio: Malr1ne is a young Russian midlaner who rose through the CIS competitive pipeline to earn a spot at Team Falcons. Known for his aggressive, impact-driven midlane play and willingness to play off-meta heroes, he has quickly established himself as one of the most promising young mids in the scene.

notable_achievements: The International 2022 Champion with Tundra Esports; one of the most accomplished American-born players in Dota 2
bio: Sneyking is a Chinese-American hard support who won The International 2022 with Tundra Esports. Known for his Enchantress and Chen specialist picks, he brings deep knowledge of pushing strategies and unconventional lineup compositions. His championship experience at Tundra now adds veteran presence to Team Falcons.

notable_achievements: The International 2019 Champion with OG; one of the most decorated supports in Western Dota 2 history
bio: Cr1t is a Danish soft support and TI 2019 world champion with OG. Renowned for his Earth Spirit and Tusk play, his aggressive roaming and fight-initiating style have defined how the position 4 role is played in Western Dota. After OG and Evil Geniuses, he now brings his championship pedigree to Team Falcons.

notable_achievements: DreamLeague Season 27 Champion with Team Yandex; consistent CIS tier-1 hard support
bio: Malady is a Kazakhstani hard support for Team Yandex, known for his calm and methodical play style. His Jakiro and Warlock play emphasizes teamfight control and sustained damage, providing a reliable backbone for his team. He won DreamLeague Season 27 with Team Yandex, marking a key achievement in his career.

notable_achievements: The International 2022 Champion with Tundra Esports; TI 2016 Runner-Up with Digital Chaos; ESL One Stockholm Major 2022 Champion; DreamLeague Season 27 Champion
bio: Martin 'Saksa' Sazdov is a Macedonian support player widely regarded as one of the most mechanically gifted position 4 players of his generation. He first rose to prominence at TI 2016 with Digital Chaos, reaching the Grand Final at just 21. He went on to claim the Aegis of Champions at TI 2022 with Tundra Esports in one of the most dominant TI runs in history. Now with Team Yandex, he brings championship experience and elite mechanical precision to an ascending CIS roster. He is the only Macedonian player to ever win the Aegis of Champions.

notable_achievements: DreamLeague Season 27 Champion with Team Yandex; 2nd Place at BLAST Slam V (2025)
bio: Evgeniy 'Noticed' Ignatenko is a Russian offlaner for Team Yandex known for his reliability, composure, and strong macro understanding. He rose through HellRaisers, Virtus.pro, and BetBoom Team before joining Team Yandex. His discipline-oriented, fundamentals-first approach to the offlane makes him a dependable frontliner in high-stakes matches. His first tier-1 international title came at DreamLeague Season 27 in 2025.

notable_achievements: DreamLeague Season 27 Champion with Team Yandex; 2nd Place at BLAST Slam V (2025); 3rd Place at FISSURE Playground #2 (2025)
bio: Danil 'Chira_Junior' Klimov is a Russian midlaner for Team Yandex considered one of the most promising young mids from the CIS region. He developed through BetBoom Team Junior before breaking through at the tier-1 level with Team Yandex. His aggressive, tempo-driven style and mechanical sharpness on mobility heroes like Ember Spirit and Storm Spirit were central to Yandex's championship run at DreamLeague Season 27.

notable_achievements: ESL One Stockholm Major 2022 Champion with OG; PGL Arlington Major 2022 Champion with OG; BLAST SLAM II, III, IV, V Champion
bio: Bozhidar 'bzm' Bogdanov is a Bulgarian midlaner widely regarded as one of the most mechanically gifted players of his generation. He rose to prominence in 2022 with OG, winning two Major titles in his debut year at the tier-1 level — one of the fastest ascents in competitive Dota history. His Invoker and Storm Spirit play set the standard for modern midlane mechanics. After OG, he joined Tundra Esports where his explosive skill complements the team's disciplined system. He is one of the youngest midlaners to win a Major in Dota 2 history.
